expert_cards.name: Alex
expert_cards.title: Labor Union Representative
expert_cards.persona: Advocate for 200,000 'Battery Belt' workers. Focused on domestic job security and preventing factory offshoring.

key_data.value: Every 5% drop in tariff below 40% results in 10,000 domestic job losses.
A 10% tariff leads to 60,000 immediate layoffs. This is unacceptable.

expert_cards.hidden_insight: Domestic factories are willing to accept lower tariffs if they receive $500M in 'Retooling Grants' to modernize their production lines.
expert_cards.primary_goal: Maintain a tariff above 30% OR secure a guarantee for modernization funding.

expert_cards.name: Taylor
expert_cards.title: Consumer Advocate
expert_cards.persona: Voice for Texas middle-class families. Focused on the 'Pocketbook' and preventing utility bill spikes.

key_data.value: A 40% tariff adds $150/month to the average family's electric bill due to grid storage costs.
Public support for green policy collapses if monthly bill increases exceed $20.

expert_cards.hidden_insight: A 15% tariff is the maximum level where the monthly bill increase remains under $20.
expert_cards.primary_goal: Keep the tariff under 15% to ensure affordability for the general public.

expert_cards.name: Sam
expert_cards.title: State Department Diplomat
expert_cards.persona: International relations specialist. Focused on preventing retaliatory trade wars that damage the Texas economy.

key_data.value: Foreign partners will trigger a 'Retaliatory Tax' on Texas Beef if the Lithium tariff exceeds 15%.
Retaliation would cost Texas ranchers and farmers $2 Billion in lost exports annually.

expert_cards.hidden_insight: Trading partners will ignore tariffs below 15% as 'standard protectionism,' but anything above 16% is seen as an act of economic war.
expert_cards.primary_goal: Finalize a deal at exactly 15% or lower to protect the agricultural sector.

expert_cards.name: Maya
expert_cards.title: Lead Climate Scientist
expert_cards.persona: Strategist for the 2035 Net Zero initiative. Focused on the speed of EV adoption and lowering carbon emissions.

key_data.value: At a 40% tariff, EV adoption drops by 60%, causing the U.S. to miss carbon targets by a decade.
A 15% tariff on current import volumes generates $600 Million in new government revenue.

expert_cards.hidden_insight: Strategic Fund (Section B) allows tariff revenue to be legally diverted into 'Innovation Grants' for domestic battery retooling.
expert_cards.primary_goal: Optimize for a 10-15% tariff to maximize adoption while using the $600M revenue to satisfy Labor interests.
